ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "loinc_num" TEXT /* LOINC number for the test */,
  "loinc_long_common_name" TEXT /* LOINC long common name for the test */,
  "ieee_cf_code10" INTEGER /* IEEE CF Code 10 for the test */,
  "ieee_refid" TEXT /* IEEE reference ID for the test */,
  "ieee_description" TEXT /* Description of the test (if available) */,
  "ieee_dim" TEXT /* Dimensional analysis of the test result */,
  "ieee_uom_ucum" TEXT /* Unit of measurement in UCUM format */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "test_cost" REAL /* Cost of performing the test */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test */,
  "test_turnaround_time" TEXT /* Average turnaround time for the test */,
  "test_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to perform the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the facility */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the facility */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., hospital, clinic, lab) */,
  "facility_license_number" TEXT /* License number for the facility */,
  "facility_accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the facility */,
  "facility_opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the facility */,
  "facility_services" TEXT /* Services provided by the facility */,
  "facility_location" TEXT /* Geographical location (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the patient */,
  "patient_address" TEXT /* Full address of the patient */,
  "patient_city" TEXT /* City of the patient */,
  "patient_state" TEXT /* State of the patient */,
  "patient_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "patient_emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "patient_emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "patient_blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "patient_medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "patient_insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the test was performed */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the test result */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "result_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to obtain the result */,
  "result_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the result */,
  "result_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the test result */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the result */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the result was updated */,
  "history_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the historical result */,
  "history_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to obtain the historical result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, doctor, lab tech) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_facility" (
  "user_facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-facility mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "user_facility_role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_facility_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_facility_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-category mapping */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "mapping_status" TEXT /* Status of the mapping (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_category_mapping_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference value */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test result */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reference range */,
  "reference_status" TEXT /* Status of the reference value (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "reference_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the reference value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_references_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_by" TEXT /* User who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, JPG) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed for the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the history */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the history was updated */,
  "history_status" TEXT /* Status of the history entry (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Allergen causing the allergy */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction to the allergen */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allergy (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Doctor who diagnosed the allergy */,
  "diagnosed_date" TEXT /* Date the allergy was diagnosed */,
  "allergy_status" TEXT /* Status of the allergy (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_status" TEXT /* Status of the medication (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
